rice.growing_tips: Requires hot and humid climate. Best grown in clayey loam soil which can retain water.

maize.growing_tips: Needs well-drained fertile soils. Avoid waterlogging at any growth stage.

chickpea.growing_tips: Grows well in dry and cold climates. Does not tolerate heavy rains.

kidneybeans.growing_tips: Needs well-drained loamy soils. Sensitive to frost and waterlogging.

pigeonpeas.growing_tips: Deep-rooted crop, highly drought-tolerant. Prefers well-drained soils.

mothbeans.growing_tips: Extremely drought-resistant. Grows well in sandy soils.

mungbean.growing_tips: Short duration crop. Needs warm climate and well-drained loamy soil.

blackgram.growing_tips: Requires a hot and humid climate. Cannot tolerate frost or waterlogging.

lentil.growing_tips: Grows best in cold climates. Requires very little irrigation.

pomegranate.growing_tips: Thrives in semi-arid conditions. Needs hot summers and cool winters.

banana.growing_tips: Requires consistent moisture and warm tropical climate. Protect from strong winds.

mango.growing_tips: Needs distinct dry weather during flowering. Prefers deep, well-drained soil.

grapes.growing_tips: Requires hot, dry summers and cool winters. Pruning is essential for good yield.

watermelon.growing_tips: Thrives in hot weather. Needs sandy loam soil and frequent irrigation.

muskmelon.growing_tips: Requires warm, dry weather and plenty of sunshine. Avoid waterlogging.

apple.growing_tips: Requires chilling hours during winter. Best grown in hilly areas.

orange.growing_tips: Needs sub-tropical climate. Sensitive to both frost and extreme heat.

papaya.growing_tips: Highly sensitive to frost and waterlogging. Needs well-drained soil.

coconut.growing_tips: Thrives in humid coastal regions. Needs well-distributed rainfall.

cotton.growing_tips: Requires 210 frost-free days. Needs black or alluvial soils.

jute.growing_tips: Requires hot and very humid climate. Grows best in flood plains and deltas.

coffee.growing_tips: Requires shade, warm climate, and well-distributed rainfall. Grown on hill slopes.
